---
title: "03-analyze"
params:
  name: "03-analyze"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
path_target <- qproj::proj_path_target(params$name)
path_source <- qproj::proj_path_source(params$name)
path_raw <- path_source("00-raw")
path_resource <- here::here(path_raw, "d00-resource")
path_data <- here::here(path_raw, paste0("d", params$name))
```

```{r}
#| label: analyze
library(dplyr)
clean <- readr::read_csv(path_source("02-clean", "clean.csv"))

# Use a project-level shared resource.
ref <- readr::read_tsv(file.path(path_resource, "reference.tsv"))

# AMBIGUOUS: target step is a variable, not a string literal.
prev_step <- "02-clean"
also <- readr::read_csv(path_source(prev_step, "extra.csv"))

# Locally-defined R/qc.R function with one literal arg.
clean$x <- qc_norm(clean$x, method = "median")

result <- dplyr::left_join(clean, ref, by = "x")
saveRDS(result, path_target("results.rds"))
```

```{r}
#| label: db-read
# Open the SQLite written by 02-clean and run a JOIN.
con <- DBI::dbConnect(RSQLite::SQLite(), path_source("02-clean", "db.sqlite"))
joined <- DBI::dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT r.x FROM raw_seqs r JOIN ref_lookup l ON r.x = l.x")
DBI::dbExecute(con, "INSERT INTO audit_log (step, n) VALUES ('03-analyze', 1)")
DBI::dbDisconnect(con)
```
